root_cause: BufEnter fires during :new before pane_bufnr assigned. OnBufEnter returns early. A mapping never set. Default Vim A (append) hits nomodifiable pane buffer.
fix: In OnBufEnter: fall back to bufname('%') == 'VPROJ' when GetPaneBufnr() check fails. Also add safety net in AiTerminalChat to re-inject mapping.

signature: Cannot make a terminal with running job modifiable
root_cause: setbufvar(&modifiable) races terminal job startup, job already running when modifiable set
fix: never call setbufvar on terminal buffers; terminal output uses pty, not buffer modification

signature: Key not present in dictionary: col
root_cause: Vim 9.2 getbufinfo() may not include 'col' field for buffers that haven't been displayed
fix: use get(info, 'col', 1) instead of info.col direct access

context: :terminal in headless Vim or without pty
root_cause: headless Vim cannot create pty for terminal; not a bug, expected in CI
fix: wrap :terminal call in try/catch for E578, skip terminal tests in headless

context: trying to close modified buffer without force
root_cause: buffer was modified but :close or :bdelete without !
fix: use :bdelete! or :close! to force close modified buffers

root_cause: :Command<Space> in mapping adds trailing space interpreted as argument; vim9script requires strict parsing
fix: use <Cmd> prefix instead of :Command<Space> in nnoremap

signature: executing job failed: No such file or directory
root_cause: shellescape() adds single quotes that env interprets as literal filename characters; bash tries to open quote-wrapped path
fix: don't use shellescape() with env command; env is a real executable that passes args literally, not through shell

root_cause: vim9script requires variables to be declared before use in redir =>
fix: use redir @d (register) instead of redir => variable, or pre-declare var before redir

root_cause: cmdheight too high or winminwidth/winminheight preventing split
fix: temporarily lower cmdheight/winminwidth/winminheight before split, restore after

root_cause: window layout constraints from existing splits; pane (40 cols) restricts available height
fix: use term_start() with term_rows instead of :terminal ++rows, or close/reopen pane before terminal
